# PayKit

> Open-source payment orchestration for modern TypeScript applications.

PayKit unifies multiple payment providers behind one API. It does not directly process payments.

## Canonical URLs

- https://paykit.sh/
- https://paykit.sh/docs
- https://paykit.sh/docs/installation
- https://paykit.sh/docs/basic-usage
- https://paykit.sh/docs/providers

## Source

- https://github.com/getpaykit/paykit

## Contact

- https://x.com/getpaykit
- https://www.linkedin.com/company/getpaykit
